response.global_analysis: 1. Vocal Events: None. The video does not contain any vocal music or spoken dialogue, only instrumental background music. 2. Visual Events: A prominent handwritten commemorative letter from Nekomata Okayu to her fans is displayed from 01:14.000 onwards. Translated and split this letter into three sequential, readable subtitle blocks. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed directly to the visual presence of the message to ensure comfortable reading.

subtitles.original: おにぎりゃー！！ 今日はお祝いしてくれてほんとにありがとう ＞ｍ＜ ♡
subtitles.english: Onigiryas!! Thank you so much for celebrating with me today ＞ｍ＜ ♡

subtitles.original: 毎日がハッピーなのも、皆のおかげ ♡ ずっっっと一緒にいようね ☆
subtitles.english: My everyday being happy is all thanks to everyone ♡ Let's stay together forever and ever ☆

subtitles.original: ちょっとでも、君の究極のきっかけになれますように... 猫又おかゆ
subtitles.english: I hope I can be even a tiny spark of your ultimate motivation... — Nekomata Okayu
